expectations.text: Has subject line and preview text
expectations.evidence: All 3 variations have subject line + preview text. E.g., V1: 'Your invitation is off to a great start' / 'Here is how to make it unforgettable.'

expectations.text: Shows premium benefits without shaming the free template choice
expectations.evidence: V1: 'Your free template is a solid foundation. Premium turns it into something your guests will remember.' V3: 'This is not about replacing what you have built. It is about elevating it.' Never shames.

expectations.text: Mentions specific premium features (animations, RSVP, photo gallery, etc.)
expectations.evidence: All 5 features listed in all 3 variations with benefit framing: 'RSVP tracking — no spreadsheets, no guessing', 'Matching thank-you cards designed to complement your invitation'.
All variations include $9.99: V1 CTA includes it, V2 states 'For $9.99', V3 CTA: 'Upgrade for $9.99'.

expectations.text: Has a clear CTA to upgrade or preview premium templates
expectations.evidence: Specific CTAs: '[Upgrade My Invitation — $9.99]', '[See What Premium Looks Like]', '[Upgrade for $9.99]'. Each strategically different.

expectations.text: Tone is encouraging and aspirational, not guilt-tripping
expectations.evidence: Consistently encouraging. V1: 'You have already done the hard part — choosing the right design.' V3: 'Planning a celebration takes real effort... Your invitation should be one less thing to worry about.'
3 variations: BAB (aspirational contrast), PPPP (storytelling), PAS (gentle opportunity). With A/B testing, cultural, and personalization notes.
